metadata.description: Representative IAP routes for connecting RKSS STAR endFixes to runway landing-flow groups. Designed to match RKSI representative IAP JSON structure.
metadata.method: Representative ILS/LOC routes by STAR endFix and runway group. RNP, VOR, missed approach and holding tracks are excluded.

representativeFor.reason: Representative non-RNP IAP route for connecting RKSS STAR endFix to final approach track.

RKSS-IAP-DOKDO-RWY14L-REP.name: DOKDO-RWY14L-REP
RKSS-IAP-DOKDO-RWY14L-REP.fullName: Representative ILS/LOC Z RWY 14L from DOKDO
RKSS-IAP-DOKDO-RWY14L-REP.sourceProcedure: ILS Z or LOC Z RWY 14L

fixes.source: (2-29) INSTR APCH CHART.pdf / ILS Z or LOC Z RWY 14L
(2-29) INSTR APCH CHART.pdf / ILS Z or LOC Z RWY 14L
(2-29) INSTR APCH CHART.pdf / ILS Z or LOC Z RWY 14L
(2-29) INSTR APCH CHART.pdf / ILS Z or LOC Z RWY 14L
(2-29) INSTR APCH CHART.pdf / ILS Z or LOC Z RWY 14L
(2-29) INSTR APCH CHART.pdf / ILS Z or LOC Z RWY 14L

notes: Representative IAP route for STAR-to-IAP connection and map display.
RNP procedures excluded per user request.
Missed approach fixes and holding patterns excluded.
Leg distances are great-circle distances from stored coordinates, rounded to 0.01 NM.
Altitude fields are representative chart/profile constraints or runway threshold elevations; null means no route constraint stored for map display.

representativeFor.reason: Representative non-RNP IAP route for connecting RKSS STAR endFix to final approach track.
